TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hassan Rouhani = Mntucing hngkawas 1992 idas 8 jiyax 1 ka Hassan Rouhani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Iran ta sayang o kiya ka Hassan Rouhani, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 8 jiyax 4 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hassan Rouhani = Hassan Rouhani (kari Persia: ō≠ō≥ŔÜ ōĪŔąō≠ōßŔÜŘĆ‚Äé‚Äé, kngkawas 1948 idas 11 diyax 12Ôľć), Iran seyji cya, waycyaw cya, mnngalan Iran sosi tanpan dayhyo. Pusu kari srngaw dha ka kari Persia. Mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 6 diyax 14 na kngkawas 2013 kcka seyngkyo Soto cida mbiyax mangal Soto Iran, idas 8 diyax 3 ka psdhuwan phiyu Soto. Kngkawas 2017 idas 5 diyax 20 wada mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto dungan. Kndusan Kngkawas 1948 idas 11 cida Hassan Rouhani u mntuting Semnan Sng Sorkheh Su, mnniq Semnan Singgakuying mi Qum Singgakuying muyas smluhay waya Islam, kiya ka brah tunux bukung Khomeni na mdhu bay mpsnul niya, msmpusal wada sqraq sapah kung. Kngkawas 1980 dhuq kngkawas 2000 ngalan gying Islam Gikay. Tubrah niya seyji Kngkawas 1989 dhuq kngkawas 2005, Hassan Rouhani u ngalan Knbaraw Balay Qnlhangan Anjeyng Yingkay Misu, kngkawas 2000 prading ngalan Iran Seymung Kaygi cngweyn. Kngkawas 2003 dhuq kngkawas 2005 mniq Khatami ngalan Soto iyax cida, Hassan Rouhani ka ngalan Iran sosi tanpan dayhyo, tuhuy Ingkoku, France mi Doicu snquri psangay Yo Nongswo wada smhdu kari. Soto Kngkawas 2013 idas 4 diyax 11 cida, Hassan Rouhani pa pkla kari tumal seyngkyo Soto. Brah ini uuda seyngkyo knbeyhing han pa Knpriyux Pay taxa bay hosweynjn Afurey u wada kasi alix mpseyngkyo, Hassan Rouhani u wada mspriyux meytaq Knpriyux Paya, hiya u wada mangal dnkuhan Hatami mi Rahusangcyani. Mniq kcka 6 Soto hosweynjn u niqan 5 hiyi ka mkray pawso pay, Hassan Rouhani Dmudul mndungus seyji mi keyjay cngce, tuhuy txtaxa u ppwaluk knmalu pnluban kana. Wada rmngaw ka hiya psli phiyu kingal 'Htngayan Knkla mi Sntangan' na seyhu, tuhuy qnlangan syakay phiyu mdhu bay pnluban, so ini dayi pcahu mi mlih ka ka ndanan pcahu. Kngkawas 2013 idas 6 diyax 15, Iran Neycngpu pjla ndanan seyngkyo, knkana hyo seyngkyo u 36,704,156, wada mbiyax mangal 18,613,329 hyo ka Hassan Rouhani, wada dmka dnkuhan mi mndungus mangal burah sndhuwan Soto, ana ini uda mntu2 seyngkyo, kiya mi pusu balay pnsung hiya ka Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf pa wana balay 6,077,292 hyo ka mnangal niya. Idas 8 diyax 3 cida, Iran tubaraw bukung Khamenei mdhu bay pkla kari hniwan niya Soto ka Hassan Rouhani, Hassan Rouhani u mniq idas 8 diyax 4 mniq Gikay psdhuwan phiyu, balay bay mdhu phyuwan tu11 Soto Iran. Idas 9 diyax 27, Hassan Rouhani u tuhuy Amirika Soto Barac Obama muda mn1 pprngaw qnawal, niyi ka Soto Amirika mi Iran snpeyyah pstuq pnluban mntxan balay mpprngaw, pprngawan dha kari u rnrnu quri uuda ho uri. Kngkawas 2017 idas 4 diyax 14, Hassan Rouhani pkla kari mntxan tumal Soto seyngkyo dungan, mkmangal mntxan dungan. Idas 5 diyax 20, Iran Neycngpu ka muda pkla ndan seyngkyo, knkana hyo seyngkyo pa ya bay 40,000,000 hyo, Hassan Rouhani u wada mangal ya bay 23,000,000 hyo, wada mangal hmrinas dmka dnkuhan mi mndungus mbiyax mangal burah bnkuwan Soto dungan, ana ini mntu2 meytaq hyo. Kngkawas 2019 idas 12 diyax 17, Hassan Rouhani u musa Malaysia tumal Kngkawas 2019 Kuala Lumpur Dudux Kay, tuhuy Malaysia Sosyang Tun Dr Mahathir bin Mohamad mniq Bangunan Perdana Putra Building mtqita dqras. Ddha dha u ya bay mnuda pprngaw kari 45 pungkang. Kngkawas 2020 idas 7 diyax 18, Hassan Rouhani mniq sotu Tehran na neyge kaygi rmngaw, snpeyyah prru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) pspuruq dhuq saya, spuwan u ya bay dhuq 2500 knbkiyan hiyi sediq Iran ka wada run narux niyi, so muda snbeyhing mita knbeyhing bay narux preuru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) niyi. Hassan Rouhani u dmuwi Iran Weysngpu na burah keyngkyo, rmngaw mniq mkpiya idas niyi pa, ya bay musa 30 knbkiyan dhuq 3500 knbkiyan hiyi sediq ka muda prru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) niyi, ya bay knhbrawan hiyi musa mniq byoying u 'Nmk2 knhbrawan hiyi mnuda 150 diyax brah niya'. Seyhu Tehran uri u wada pkla burah pnwaya kmtur u muda 1 iyax sngayan diyax, kiya ka knkana hmtur pnsliyan slhayan snhiyan, hmkun ka sanan mniq sapah pyasan, sanan mihah kahuy, kcka sanan tmapaq qsiya, sanan ppulah mi sanan qmita ccamac uri. Neyke Rikisi seyngkyo Kndusan niya Hassan Rouhani pa tama niya u Asatora Rouhani, sediq snbbari mnniq Iran Semnan Su na Bazaar, kiya mi bubu niya saya u wa mniq Semnan. Kngkawas 1969, Hassan Rouhani u tuhuy Naemeh Rouhan msturung, niqan 2 laqi dha snaw mi 2 ka laqi dha qridin. Laqi niya qbsuran snaw u wada mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 4 jisacu mhuqil, kiya mi wada sdhuwan Tehran Su Habung Beyhst Cahra. Uxay wana kari Persia, Hassan Rouhani pa mkla balay skari Ingkoku mi kari Arabia. Wada mangal Ingkoku Pyasan Tubeyhing Glasgow Calledonnian Horicu (PhD) Swey hakasey sweywey.
S.PHON: = ńßassan …ĺouńßani = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka ńßassan …ĺouńßani ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan i…ĺan ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßassan …ĺouńßani, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = ńßassan …ĺouńßani = ńßassan …ĺouńßani (ka…ĺi p…ô…ĺsia: *** ********, kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ***), i…ĺan s…ô…üi ¶ja, waj ¶jaw ¶ja, mnŇčalan i…ĺan sosi tanpan dajńßjo. pusu ka…ĺi s…ĺŇčaw dńßa ka ka…ĺi p…ô…ĺsia. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** na kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida mbijax maŇčal soto i…ĺan, idas * dijax * ka psdńßuwan pńßiju soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada mnduŇčus lmutu ¶ maŇčal soto duŇčan. kndusan kŇčkawas **** idas ** ¶ida ńßassan …ĺouńßani u mntutiŇč s…ômnan sŇč so…ĺkńß…ôńß su, mnniq s…ômnan siŇčgakujiŇč mi qum siŇčgakujiŇč mujas smluńßaj waja islam, kija ka b…ĺańß tunux bukuŇč kńßom…ôni na mdńßu baj mpsnul nija, msmpusal wada sq…ĺaq sapańß kuŇč. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan gjiŇč islam gikaj. tub…ĺańß nija s…ô…üi kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u Ňčalan knba…ĺaw balaj qnlńßaŇčan an…ü…ôŇč jiŇčkaj misu, kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan i…ĺan s…ômuŇč kajgi ¶Ňčw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mniq kńßatami Ňčalan soto ijax ¶ida, ńßassan …ĺouńßani ka Ňčalan i…ĺan sosi tanpan dajńßjo, tuńßuj iŇčkoku, *…ĺan ¶…ô mi doi ¶u snqu…ĺi psaŇčaj jo noŇčswo wada smńßdu ka…ĺi. soto kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, ńßassan …ĺouńßani pa pkla ka…ĺi tumal s…ôŇčkjo soto. b…ĺańß ini uuda s…ôŇčkjo knb…ôńßiŇč ńßan pa knp…ĺijux paj taxa baj ńßosw…ôn…ün a*u…ĺ…ô u wada kasi alix mps…ôŇčkjo, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u wada msp…ĺijux m…ôtaq knp…ĺijux paja, ńßija u wada maŇčal dnkuńßan ńßatami mi …ĺańßusaŇč ¶jani. mniq k ¶ka * soto ńßosw…ôn…ün u niqan * ńßiji ka mk…ĺaj pawso paj, ńßassan …ĺouńßani dmudul mnduŇčus s…ô…üi mi k…ô…üaj ¶Ňč ¶…ô, tuńßuj txtaxa u ppwaluk knmalu pnluban kana. wada …ĺmŇčaw ka ńßija psli pńßiju kiŇčal 'ńßtŇčajan knkla mi sntaŇčan' na s…ôńßu, tuńßuj qnlaŇčan sjakaj pńßiju mdńßu baj pnluban, so ini daji p ¶ańßu mi mlińß ka ka ndanan p ¶ańßu. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, i…ĺan n…ô ¶Ňčpu p…üla ndanan s…ôŇčkjo, knkana ńßjo s…ôŇčkjo u **,***,***, wada mbijax maŇčal **,***,*** ńßjo ka ńßassan …ĺouńßani, wada dmka dnkuńßan mi mnduŇčus maŇčal bu…ĺańß sndńßuwan soto, ana ini uda mntu* s…ôŇčkjo, kija mi pusu balaj pnsuŇč ńßija ka mońßammad bagńß…ô…ĺ gńßaliba* pa wana balaj *,***,*** ńßjo ka mnaŇčal nija. idas * dijax * ¶ida, i…ĺan tuba…ĺaw bukuŇč kńßam…ôn…ôi mdńßu baj pkla ka…ĺi ńßniwan nija soto ka ńßassan …ĺouńßani, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u mniq idas * dijax * mniq gikaj psdńßuwan pńßiju, balaj baj mdńßu pńßjuwan tu** soto i…ĺan. idas * dijax **, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u tuńßuj ami…ĺika soto ba…ĺa ¶ obama muda mn* pp…ĺŇčaw qnawal, niji ka soto ami…ĺika mi i…ĺan snp…ôjańß pstuq pnluban mntxan balaj mpp…ĺŇčaw, pp…ĺŇčawan dńßa ka…ĺi u …ĺn…ĺnu qu…ĺi uuda ńßo u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßassan …ĺouńßani pkla ka…ĺi mntxan tumal soto s…ôŇčkjo duŇčan, mkmaŇčal mntxan duŇčan. idas * dijax **, i…ĺan n…ô ¶Ňčpu ka muda pkla ndan s…ôŇčkjo, knkana ńßjo s…ôŇčkjo pa ja baj **,***,*** ńßjo, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u wada maŇčal ja baj **,***,*** ńßjo, wada maŇčal ńßm…ĺinas dmka dnkuńßan mi mnduŇčus mbijax maŇčal bu…ĺańß bnkuwan soto duŇčan, ana ini mntu* m…ôtaq ńßjo. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u musa malajsia tumal kŇčkawas **** kuala lumpu…ĺ dudux kaj, tuńßuj malajsia sosjaŇč tun d…ĺ mańßatńßi…ĺ bin mońßamad mniq baŇčunan p…ô…ĺdana put…ĺa buildiŇč mtqita dq…ĺas. ddńßa dńßa u ja baj mnuda pp…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi ** puŇčkaŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßassan …ĺouńßani mniq sotu t…ôńß…ĺan na n…ôg…ô kajgi …ĺmŇčaw, snp…ôjańß p…ĺ…ĺu na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ¶jokoku uńßan (na…ĺux ¶o*id-**) pspu…ĺuq dńßuq saja, spuwan u ja baj dńßuq **** knbkijan ńßiji s…ôdiq i…ĺan ka wada …ĺun na…ĺux niji, so muda snb…ôńßiŇč mita knb…ôńßiŇč baj na…ĺux p…ĺ…ôu…ĺu na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ¶jokoku uńßan (na…ĺux ¶o*id-**) niji. ńßassan …ĺouńßani u dmuwi i…ĺan w…ôsŇčpu na bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčkjo, …ĺmŇčaw mniq mkpija idas niji pa, ja baj musa ** knbkijan dńßuq **** knbkijan ńßiji s…ôdiq ka muda p…ĺ…ĺu na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ¶jokoku uńßan (na…ĺux ¶o*id-**) niji, ja baj knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji musa mniq bjojiŇč u 'nmk* knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji mnuda *** dijax b…ĺańß nija'. s…ôńßu t…ôńß…ĺan u…ĺi u wada pkla bu…ĺańß pnwaja kmtu…ĺ u muda * ijax sŇčajan dijax, kija ka knkana ńßmtu…ĺ pnslijan slńßajan snńßijan, ńßmkun ka sanan mniq sapańß pjasan, sanan mińßańß kańßuj, k ¶ka sanan tmapaq qsija, sanan ppulańß mi sanan qmita ¶ ¶ama ¶ u…ĺi. n…ôk…ô …ĺikisi s…ôŇčkjo kndusan nija ńßassan …ĺouńßani pa tama nija u asato…ĺa …ĺouńßani, s…ôdiq snbba…ĺi mnniq i…ĺan s…ômnan su na ba*aa…ĺ, kija mi bubu nija saja u wa mniq s…ômnan. kŇčkawas ****, ńßassan …ĺouńßani u tuńßuj na…ôm…ôńß …ĺouńßan mstu…ĺuŇč, niqan * laqi dńßa snaw mi * ka laqi dńßa q…ĺidin. laqi nija qbsu…ĺan snaw u wada mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * …üisa ¶u mńßuqil, kija mi wada sdńßuwan t…ôńß…ĺan su ńßabuŇč b…ôńßst ¶ańß…ĺa. uxaj wana ka…ĺi p…ô…ĺsia, ńßassan …ĺouńßani pa mkla balaj ska…ĺi iŇčkoku mi ka…ĺi a…ĺabia. wada maŇčal iŇčkoku pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč glasgow ¶all…ôdonnian ńßo…ĺi ¶u (pńßd) sw…ô ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô.
S.FORM: = Hassan Rouhani = Mntucing hngkawas 1992 idas 8 jiyax 1 ka Hassan Rouhani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Iran ta sayang o kiya ka Hassan Rouhani, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 8 jiyax 4 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hassan Rouhani = Hassan Rouhani (kari Persia: ō≠ō≥ŔÜ ōĪŔąō≠ōßŔÜŘĆ‚Äé‚Äé, kngkawas 1948 idas 11 diyax 12Ôľć), Iran seyji cya, waycyaw cya, mnngalan Iran sosi tanpan dayhyo. Pusu kari srngaw dha ka kari Persia. Mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 6 diyax 14 na kngkawas 2013 kcka seyngkyo Soto cida mbiyax mangal Soto Iran, idas 8 diyax 3 ka psdhuwan phiyu Soto. Kngkawas 2017 idas 5 diyax 20 wada mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto dungan. Kndusan Kngkawas 1948 idas 11 cida Hassan Rouhani u mntuting Semnan Sng Sorkheh Su, mnniq Semnan Singgakuying mi Qum Singgakuying muyas smluhay waya Islam, kiya ka brah tunux bukung Khomeni na mdhu bay mpsnul niya, msmpusal wada sqraq sapah kung. Kngkawas 1980 dhuq kngkawas 2000 ngalan gying Islam Gikay. Tubrah niya seyji Kngkawas 1989 dhuq kngkawas 2005, Hassan Rouhani u ngalan Knbaraw Balay Qnlhangan Anjeyng Yingkay Misu, kngkawas 2000 prading ngalan Iran Seymung Kaygi cngweyn. Kngkawas 2003 dhuq kngkawas 2005 mniq Khatami ngalan Soto iyax cida, Hassan Rouhani ka ngalan Iran sosi tanpan dayhyo, tuhuy Ingkoku, France mi Doicu snquri psangay Yo Nongswo wada smhdu kari. Soto Kngkawas 2013 idas 4 diyax 11 cida, Hassan Rouhani pa pkla kari tumal seyngkyo Soto. Brah ini uuda seyngkyo knbeyhing han pa Knpriyux Pay taxa bay hosweynjn Afurey u wada kasi alix mpseyngkyo, Hassan Rouhani u wada mspriyux meytaq Knpriyux Paya, hiya u wada mangal dnkuhan Hatami mi Rahusangcyani. Mniq kcka 6 Soto hosweynjn u niqan 5 hiyi ka mkray pawso pay, Hassan Rouhani Dmudul mndungus seyji mi keyjay cngce, tuhuy txtaxa u ppwaluk knmalu pnluban kana. Wada rmngaw ka hiya psli phiyu kingal 'Htngayan Knkla mi Sntangan' na seyhu, tuhuy qnlangan syakay phiyu mdhu bay pnluban, so ini dayi pcahu mi mlih ka ka ndanan pcahu. Kngkawas 2013 idas 6 diyax 15, Iran Neycngpu pjla ndanan seyngkyo, knkana hyo seyngkyo u 36,704,156, wada mbiyax mangal 18,613,329 hyo ka Hassan Rouhani, wada dmka dnkuhan mi mndungus mangal burah sndhuwan Soto, ana ini uda mntu2 seyngkyo, kiya mi pusu balay pnsung hiya ka Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf pa wana balay 6,077,292 hyo ka mnangal niya. Idas 8 diyax 3 cida, Iran tubaraw bukung Khamenei mdhu bay pkla kari hniwan niya Soto ka Hassan Rouhani, Hassan Rouhani u mniq idas 8 diyax 4 mniq Gikay psdhuwan phiyu, balay bay mdhu phyuwan tu11 Soto Iran. Idas 9 diyax 27, Hassan Rouhani u tuhuy Amirika Soto Barac Obama muda mn1 pprngaw qnawal, niyi ka Soto Amirika mi Iran snpeyyah pstuq pnluban mntxan balay mpprngaw, pprngawan dha kari u rnrnu quri uuda ho uri. Kngkawas 2017 idas 4 diyax 14, Hassan Rouhani pkla kari mntxan tumal Soto seyngkyo dungan, mkmangal mntxan dungan. Idas 5 diyax 20, Iran Neycngpu ka muda pkla ndan seyngkyo, knkana hyo seyngkyo pa ya bay 40,000,000 hyo, Hassan Rouhani u wada mangal ya bay 23,000,000 hyo, wada mangal hmrinas dmka dnkuhan mi mndungus mbiyax mangal burah bnkuwan Soto dungan, ana ini mntu2 meytaq hyo. Kngkawas 2019 idas 12 diyax 17, Hassan Rouhani u musa Malaysia tumal Kngkawas 2019 Kuala Lumpur Dudux Kay, tuhuy Malaysia Sosyang Tun Dr Mahathir bin Mohamad mniq Bangunan Perdana Putra Building mtqita dqras. Ddha dha u ya bay mnuda pprngaw kari 45 pungkang. Kngkawas 2020 idas 7 diyax 18, Hassan Rouhani mniq sotu Tehran na neyge kaygi rmngaw, snpeyyah prru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) pspuruq dhuq saya, spuwan u ya bay dhuq 2500 knbkiyan hiyi sediq Iran ka wada run narux niyi, so muda snbeyhing mita knbeyhing bay narux preuru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) niyi. Hassan Rouhani u dmuwi Iran Weysngpu na burah keyngkyo, rmngaw mniq mkpiya idas niyi pa, ya bay musa 30 knbkiyan dhuq 3500 knbkiyan hiyi sediq ka muda prru Narux Punu Brah Cyokoku Uhan (Narux COVID-19) niyi, ya bay knhbrawan hiyi musa mniq byoying u 'Nmk2 knhbrawan hiyi mnuda 150 diyax brah niya'. Seyhu Tehran uri u wada pkla burah pnwaya kmtur u muda 1 iyax sngayan diyax, kiya ka knkana hmtur pnsliyan slhayan snhiyan, hmkun ka sanan mniq sapah pyasan, sanan mihah kahuy, kcka sanan tmapaq qsiya, sanan ppulah mi sanan qmita ccamac uri. Neyke Rikisi seyngkyo Kndusan niya Hassan Rouhani pa tama niya u Asatora Rouhani, sediq snbbari mnniq Iran Semnan Su na Bazaar, kiya mi bubu niya saya u wa mniq Semnan. Kngkawas 1969, Hassan Rouhani u tuhuy Naemeh Rouhan msturung, niqan 2 laqi dha snaw mi 2 ka laqi dha qridin. Laqi niya qbsuran snaw u wada mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 4 jisacu mhuqil, kiya mi wada sdhuwan Tehran Su Habung Beyhst Cahra. Uxay wana kari Persia, Hassan Rouhani pa mkla balay skari Ingkoku mi kari Arabia. Wada mangal Ingkoku Pyasan Tubeyhing Glasgow Calledonnian Horicu (PhD) Swey hakasey sweywey.

dajńßjo. pusu ka…ĺi s…ĺŇčaw dńßa ka ka…ĺi p…ô…ĺsia. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** na kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida mbijax maŇčal soto i…ĺan, idas * dijax * ka psdńßuwan pńßiju soto.
